features.title: Slide creation
features.text: Creates editable slides from PDF pages.

about_formats: PDF pages can be converted into individual slides.
PPTX is editable in presentation software like PowerPoint.
common_problems: Complex layouts may not map exactly
tips: Use high-resolution images in PDFs for best results

faq.question: Can I edit text after conversion?
faq.answer: Extracted text is editable but may require layout adjustments.
